series_metadata.series_title: Application, Affidavit, and Related Documents for Replacement Warrants
series_metadata.series_description: All documents related to a request for a replacement warrant including the application, submitted affidavits, correspondence, and other documentation of the request.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Auditor of State audit released and all discrepancies resolved. ; Electronic: Auditor of State audit released and all discrepancies resolved
